pr.title: Non-record: Fused Triton relu^2 kernel — negative result (val_bpb=1.1198)

output.summary: Custom Triton kernel fuses relu² MLP activations to avoid intermediate HBM writes while falling back to torch.compile when fusion already covers it.
techniques: Fused Triton relu² kernel to eliminate intermediate hidden tensor writes
Torch.compile fallback preserves correctness when Triton adds no gain
